channel.title: Programming on Anohba Jehad
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Anohba Jehad

item.title: Behind the Prompt
item.description: If you’ve ever used a Linux terminal or written a script to automate tasks on a Unix-like system, you’ve already brushed up against the world of shell scripting. But there’s one term that often floats around with little explanation, the POSIX shell. What is it, and why does it matter? What Is a Shell? A shell is a program that provides a command-line interface (CLI) for users to interact with the operating system.

item.title: Threaded Realities: Beyond the Loop
item.description: A* Algorithm Made Easy When we want a computer, robot, or game character to move from one place to another, the biggest challenge is: how to find the shortest and best path? The A* (A-Star) algorithm helps us do exactly that, in a smart and efficient way. What is A* (A-Star)? The A* algorithm is a popular and efficient pathfinding and graph traversal algorithm used to find the shortest path between a start node and a goal node.

item.title: Threaded Realities: Beyond the Loop
